• Show All Code
  • Hide All Code

TTE Simulation Results Analysis

RMSE, Bias, Coverage, and Extreme Subgroup Identification Analysis

TTE Simulation Results Analysis

This document analyzes Time-to-Event (TTE) simulation results, calculating: - RMSE (Root Mean Squared Error) - Bias (Mean difference between estimate and truth) - Coverage (Proportion of 95% CIs containing the true value) - Extreme Subgroup Identification Accuracy (Proportion of replications correctly identifying the subgroup most different from the overall treatment effect)

All metrics are calculated on the log-scale (log hazard ratios).
